Patch Set 1:

> Abandoned

Hi Etienne, when abandoning a patch, it is useful to include a reason.

Patch Set 1:

> > Abandoned
 > 
 > Hi Etienne, when abandoning a patch, it is useful to include a
 > reason.

Hi Andreas,

Sorry, I have abandoned because I think that I can do a proper fix for this issue (https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/40565).

I tested this patch and it seems to resolve this issue but it will forbid parallel executions of keys_fill. So I prefer to propose a patch to lock per context basis (it will wait in function only if keys_fill is called with same context).

parents.subject: LU-13666 lod: update .do_index_ops on layout detach

commit.subject: LU-14110 obdclass: Protect keys_fill instances
commit.message:
LU-14110 obdclass: Protect keys_fill instances

keys_fill could be call by different mount instances on the same
client for the same lu_context. This result to a race: we can
alcocate context memory several time for the same context and
increment each time "lu_context_key.lct_used".

When "rmmod lustre" is called, "lct_fini" functions will free the
memory at the address contains in "lct_value" and not the additional
memory allocate during the race, that's why lct_used will remain > 0
and "lu_context_key_degister" will hang.

This patch prevents several "keys_fill" instances to run at the same
time.

Signed-off-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I1b0dd688d26214d30387a815e9909838771716d1
